questions.text: I enjoy solving mathematical problems and understanding formulas.
I find it fascinating to learn about how the human body works and functions.

I enjoy reading about historical events and understanding how societies evolved.
I prefer working in groups rather than alone on projects.
I like analyzing data and finding patterns in numbers.
I am curious about different diseases and their treatments.
I want to learn about stock markets and investment strategies.
I enjoy debating social issues and current affairs.
I feel comfortable speaking in front of large groups.
I prefer subjects with clear logical answers over subjective discussions.
I find genetics and evolution topics very interesting.
I want to understand how companies manage their finances.
I enjoy studying different cultures and their traditions.
I like helping others understand difficult concepts.

I am interested in environmental science and ecology.
I want to learn about marketing and advertising strategies.
I find psychology and human behavior fascinating.
I enjoy organizing events and coordinating with people.

I prefer team sports over individual activities.

I feel energized when working with others on common goals.
